dev.jeka.core.api.system

Class JkProcess

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.system.JkAbstractProcess<JkProcess>
      • dev.jeka.core.api.system.JkProcess
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Runnable

    public class JkProcess
extends JkAbstractProcess<JkProcess>
    The JkProcess class represents a process that can be executed on the system. It provides various methods for configuring and executing the process.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class dev.jeka.core.api.system.JkAbstractProcess

        CURRENT_JAVA_DIR

      static JkProcess of(java.lang.String... parameters)
      Creates a JkProcess using the specified command and parameters.

      Creates a new JkProcess object using the specified command line.
      static JkProcess ofJavaTool(java.lang.String javaTool, java.lang.String... parameters)
      Defines a JkProcess using the specified tool of the JDK and parameters.
      static JkProcess ofWinOrUx(java.lang.String windowsCommand, java.lang.String unixCommand, java.lang.String... parameters)
      Creates a new JkProcess object with the appropriate command based on the operating system.

    • Method Detail

      • copy

        protected JkProcess copy()
        Overrides:
        copy in class JkAbstractProcess<JkProcess>

      • of

        public static JkProcess of(java.lang.String... parameters)
        Creates a JkProcess using the specified command and parameters.

      • ofCmdLine

        public static JkProcess ofCmdLine(java.lang.String commandLine,
                                  java.lang.String... tokens)
        Creates a new JkProcess object using the specified command line.
        Parameters:
        commandLine - The command line to be executed. The command line is a space separated string that will be parsed in an array od arguments.

      • ofWinOrUx

        public static JkProcess ofWinOrUx(java.lang.String windowsCommand,
                                  java.lang.String unixCommand,
                                  java.lang.String... parameters)
        Creates a new JkProcess object with the appropriate command based on the operating system.
        Parameters:
        windowsCommand - The command to be executed on Windows.
        unixCommand - The command to be executed on Unix-like systems.
        parameters - The parameters to be passed to the command.

      • ofJavaTool

        public static JkProcess ofJavaTool(java.lang.String javaTool,
                                   java.lang.String... parameters)
        Defines a JkProcess using the specified tool of the JDK and parameters. An example of JDK tool is 'javac'.
